prompt: I've finished implementing CRUD endpoints for user management. The baseline commit is abc1234. Please do an adversarial review of my changes.
assertions: The review identifies SQL injection as a Critical finding
The review identifies at least 4 distinct findings total
Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
Each finding includes a file location reference
The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
The review identifies the missing/empty test stubs as a finding
The review process uses a subagent (Task tool) for information asymmetry
